text:
Individuals in long-term care facilities have 
different medical needs and different costs. PACE organizations are a distinct set of contracts that target specific 
Medicare populations and are a relatively small proportion of the MA enrollment. 

As with the Medicare Part C HCCs, CMS has developed several Part D model segments (e.g., Rx model segments). 
These include: 1) aged, 2) disabled, 3) institutional, and 4) new enrollee. CMS further divides some of these segments 
into low income and
